title: Additional Additions
description: A vanilla+ mod that expands on incomplete parts of Minecraft with additions that truly feel vanilla. Brings improvements to sniffers, music discs, enchanting, farming, food, redstone, and more.

<details>
<summary>Text version of the description</summary>

# Additional Additions
Additional Additions is a mod that expands on parts of vanilla that feel incomplete with additions that feel like they should already be part of vanilla.

## What's in the mod

### Don't like something?
Additional Additions is made to be configurable. You can modify and even completely disable any of the features in the mod!
Look inside the config files, and see the wiki for more info.

### Sniffer Plants
The sniffer receives 11 new flowers!
Collect them all, decorate your base, and craft them into something new: Suspicious Dyes!

### Suspicious Dyes
Craft Sniffer Flowers into Suspicious Dyes.
Apply a suspicious dye to enchanted gear on a crafting table to change the color of its glint!

### Albums
Have a lot of music discs from all the adventures?
Throw them all into an Album and play it on a Jukebox! It works like a playlist, so your tracks play one after another.
And of course, it makes a great pair with the Pocket Jukebox.

### Pocket Jukebox
With the Pocket Jukebox, you can listen to your music discs on the go! 
Simply have one in your inventory, and insert a music disc (or album) inside.

### Watering Can
A great way not to starve early game is watering your crops, which you can now do with the Watering Can.
Just add water, and maybe, your crops will grow up faster.

### Copper Patina
Scrape oxidation off copper blocks with an axe to collect Patina. Use it on copper blocks to re-oxidize them.
When placed down, Patina acts as redstone wire. It won't connect to vanilla redstone, allowing you to run wires in parallel.

### Rose Gold
A new tier to bridge the gap between Iron and Diamond, because a mod without a new tier isn’t a mod.
Craft Rose Gold Ingots with 4 Copper and 4 Gold Ingots, and upgrade your Iron equipment into Rose Gold.

### Rope
You can place down ropes from the top of a cliff. Just keep clicking the top block, and the rope will drop down to the bottom.
Also, craft it into Rope Arrows.

### Foods
A few (3) food items are added for variety. Those include:
Sweet Berry Pie — made from sweet berries.
Honeyed Apple — giving honey a new food purpose.
Fried Egg — I love EGGS.

### Trident Shard
Ever thought sea temples were useless? Ever thought killing thousands of drowneds for a trident is a grind? Ever thought both of those things?
Obtain Trident Shards by defeating an Elder Guardian in a sea temple, and craft three of them into a trident!

### Glow Stick
A throwable light source, which can also be used underwater!
Craft it using sticks and glow ink sacs, and explore caverns and sunk ships in a whole new light.

### Adoghr
What the hell is an adoghr?
Great question. He provided this wonderful mod with THREE original tracks, and they are bangers.
Find them in dungeon chests!
They are NOT copyrighted and are licensed under Creative Commons, so you won’t get striked! Don’t worry!

### Wrench
An ideal tool for those times when you can’t get into a tiny gap to place a block with the right rotation.
Right click on (almost) any rotatable block to rotate it!
Also works with Dispensers if you’re a redstoner.

### Barometer
A small utility item, similar to the clock and the compass.
It measures your elevation (Y-level) in the world.

### And some minor tweaks:
- Spyglass now appears in sunk ship chests.
- Powered rails can be crafted from copper instead of gold.
Of course, you can disable them, like anything else in the mod!
